title: sideroxylon novozelandicum
intro: Sideroxylon novozelandicum, also known as the New Zealand titree or titree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and bark, which contain compounds that exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Sideroxylon novozelandicum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and bark, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
